chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1347 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4114/2022 (C/A) 07.12.2022 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Najaf Ali Janwri, Clerk of Municipal Committee, Khairpur is present on behalf of Accounts Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur and submits through compliance report an original cheque bearing No.37211634 dated 07.12.2022, amounting Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac), in favour of the petitioner, being outstanding amount towards his retirement benefits, which is received by the petitioner, who is present in person, under acknowledgment on photocopy of the cheque. Since order dated 08.02.2022, whereby instant petition was disposed of, has been complied with, listed application also stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
